hero.description: 45+ years equipping Egypt's workshops, dealerships, and fleet operators with the world's most trusted automotive equipment brands.

categories.heading: Equipment Categories
categories.subheading: Six specialized categories covering every corner of the professional automotive workshop.

why.heading: Why Choose Elbassiouni
why.subheading: Four decades of trust, built one workshop at a time.
why.r1Desc: Since 1980, Elbassiouni has been the trusted name in automotive equipment across Egypt. Our deep market knowledge means we recommend the right solution for your specific needs.
why.r2Desc: We represent only the most respected international manufacturers — Hunter Engineering, Rotary Lift, Maha Haldenwang, and 11 more — giving you access to the best equipment available.
why.r3Desc: From installation and training to maintenance contracts and spare parts, our support team ensures your equipment performs at its best throughout its lifetime.
why.r4Desc: All equipment we supply meets Egyptian regulatory requirements. Our inspection lane systems are fully compliant with traffic authority standards.

cta.heading: Ready to Equip Your Workshop?
cta.description: Contact our team today for product demonstrations, pricing, and expert advice tailored to your operation.

about.heading: About Elbassiouni
about.intro: For over 45 years, Elbassiouni Automotive Equipment has been the trusted partner of workshops, dealerships, and fleet operators across Egypt — bringing the world's best automotive equipment to the Egyptian market.
about.historySubtitle: Four decades of building Egypt's automotive service industry.
about.p1: Founded in Cairo in 1980, Elbassiouni Automotive Equipment began as a specialist importer of professional workshop equipment, serving a market that was rapidly professionalizing its automotive service infrastructure.
about.p2: Over the decades, we established exclusive agency agreements with the world's leading automotive equipment manufacturers — brands like Hunter Engineering, Rotary Lift, and Maha Haldenwang — becoming their dedicated representative in the Egyptian market.
about.p3: Today, our portfolio spans 14 international brands across 6 equipment categories, covering everything from vehicle lifts and wheel alignment to spray booths and inspection lane systems.
about.p4: Our after-sales division — covering installation, training, maintenance contracts, and spare parts — ensures that every piece of equipment we sell continues to perform at its best throughout its operational life.
about.m1985: First exclusive agency for a European automotive equipment brand
about.m2005: Launched inspection lane division, supplying government centers
about.m2015: Portfolio grows to 10 premium international brands
about.m2024: Representing 14 world-class brands across 6 equipment categories
about.m2026: Continued commitment to equipping Egypt's automotive future
about.vQualityDesc: We represent only manufacturers with proven track records and international certifications.
about.vPartnershipDesc: We build long-term relationships with our clients, not just one-time transactions.
about.vExpertiseDesc: Our team brings decades of hands-on knowledge in automotive workshop equipment.
about.vSupportDesc: We stand behind every product with comprehensive after-sales service and spare parts.

services.heading: Our Services
services.intro: We don't just supply equipment — we support it. Our after-sales team is with you from installation to end-of-life, ensuring peak performance every step of the way.
services.offerSubtitle: Six core service disciplines, delivered by our certified technical team.
services.ctaSubtitle: Our team will respond within one business day.

news.heading: News & Updates
news.subheading: Company news, product launches, and industry updates.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.subheading: Our team typically responds within one business day.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will be in touch shortly.
